basic_details.job_title: ICSIL Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 25 Helper/MTS, DEO Posts
basic_details.short_information: Intelligent Communication Systems India Ltd. (ICSIL) has published the Helper/MTS and Data Entry Operator (DEO) Notification 2026 on 18 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 25 positions across Helper/MTS and DEO posts. Candidates up to 40 years of age and holding qualifications such as 12th Pass with computer knowledge of Excel & Tally for DEO, or 10th Pass for Helper/MTS are eligible to attend the walk-in interview on 21 May 2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and check the details via the direct links provided below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years for all posts. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: 12th Pass and having computer knowledge of Excel & Tally, 10th Pass
qualification.details: Data Entry Operator: 12th Pass and having computer knowledge of Excel & Tally Helper/MTS: 10th Pass

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ICSIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the ICSIL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is scheduled for 21st May 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What are the eligibility criteria for the Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Data Entry Operator position, candidates must have passed the 12th standard and possess computer knowledge in Excel and Tally. The maximum age limit is 40 years.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Helper/MTS post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Helper/MTS post is Rs. 18,494/- per month. This is a contractual position announced by ICSIL.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available in this ICSIL recruitment drive?
faq.answer: A total of 25 vacancies are available for various posts in this ICSIL recruitment drive. The posts include Data Entry Operator and Helper/MTS.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for ICSIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee for both General/OBC and SC/ST categories is Rs. 590/-. This fee is applicable for candidates applying for the various posts.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the posts announced by ICSIL?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts announced by ICSIL is 40 years. There is no minimum age specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these ICSIL jobs?
faq.answer: The selection process for the ICSIL Recruitment 2026 will involve Document Verification followed by an Interview/Interaction with the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview venue for ICSIL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110015. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for the exact venue address.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs to the walk-in interview venue.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, the ICSIL Recruitment 2026 is for contractual positions. Candidates will be hired on a contract basis as per the terms and conditions mentioned in the official notification.
